## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes (frontmatter is schema-validated at build time)
- [ ] Every claim is backed by a linked public source
- [ ] `lastReviewed` is set to today on any entry I added or re-assessed
- [ ] I didn't edit `data/metrics/` (machine-written; the daily job owns it)
